message:
refactor(runtime): locale testability and terminal writer ghosting fix

locale.rs:
- Extract detect_system_locale_from() as pure function taking explicit params
- Enables deterministic testing without env::set_var (unsafe in Rust 2024)
- Add comprehensive tests for LC_ALL/LANG priority and fallbacks
- Add locale_override_is_lifo test verifying LIFO stack semantics

terminal_writer.rs:
- Fix ghosting when buffer shrinks below visible height
- Previous code cleared entire UI region unconditionally
- Now only clear rows below buffer content when buf_height < visible_height
- Prevents stale content from persisting when UI dynamically resizes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
